commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore was the wrath of the LORD kindled against his people, so much that he abhorred his own inheritance. Augustine of Hippo 29. "Therefore was the wrath of the Lord kindled against His own people" (ver. Our translators have been unwilling to use the word anger, for the Greek qumoj; though some have used it; while others translate by "indignation" or "mind. " Whichever of these terms be adopted, passion doth not affect God; but the power of punishing hath assumed this name metaphorically from custom.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
